Patch Set 2:

Michal, are you sure you pulled these changes correctly. As that looks like the issue which these changes fix.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Looks good to MERGE - just pending the removal of the -1

Patch Set 2:

The DMaaP team has posted results – looks good – I have +1’d the review along with several other developers – we can get an OOM committer to merge +2 the change as soon as the -1 review is removed from March 1st.

Workaround for -1 hanging reviews:
There is a workaround to remove -1 reviews where the reviewer may be away or on vacation – submit a new patch to the review – in this case do a minor change to a comment on a helm chart that will not require a full CD retest/review and then we will reset the reviews – we can then +2 the change

The procedure to repatch (rebase is not enough) is here if you need it - https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/ONAP+Development#ONAPDevelopment-Amendingexistinggerritchangesinreview

/michael
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2
Change has been successfully merged by James MacNider
